title: paesia glandulosa
intro: Paesia glandulosa, also known as the Himalayan maidenhair fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Paesia glandulosa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Paesia glandulosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
